2209980.name: Aposfera Spacetrips
2209980.description:
Introducing Aposfera Spacetrips, an indie full-scale space simulator, flawlessly crafted using the power of Unreal Engine 5. Experience an expansive, procedurally generated universe that feels as if it was created just for you, ripe for endless exploration and wandering. A universe where you can live out your space fantasies, interact with celestial bodies, and uncover the mysteries of far-off star systems.

Explore. Discover. Create.

Delve into the limitless reaches of space, construct your network of spacetrips, and encounter the unknown. Wield the power of future technologies to build spaceships, stations, colonies, and gigastructures. Watch as your technical infrastructure expands and evolves, reflecting your journey and growth.

Full-scaled. Interactive worlds. Celestials bodies. Star Systems.
Spaceship trips. Colonies and Spaceports. Anomalies and Exploring.
Meditation and Creations.

Features:
  • Endless Procedural Universe Generation: Your playground is an endlessly expanding cosmos. Dive into the deep space and let the wonders of the universe astound you.
  • Full-Scale Celestial Bodies: Every celestial body - Stars, Star Systems, Planets, Moons - are fully explorable. Prepare yourself for an adventure of galactic proportions.
  • 1st/3rd Person Sci-Fi RPG Adventure: Uncover the secrets of space, expand your spacetrips network, and meet the unknown. Your journey will be as unique as the universe itself.
  • Live in Your Personal Sci-Fi Setting: Make use of futuristic technologies to build spaceships, stations, colonies, gigastructures, and a technical infrastructure.
  • Meditative Space Trips: Sometimes, the most profound adventure is to simply exist. Relax, sit back, and soak in the breathtaking views.
  • Your Spaceship, Your Space Fortress: Construct your very own space ark, and surf the expanse of the universe in comfort and style.

Technical Information:
  • Powered by Unreal Engine 5: Experience the full power of Unreal Engine 5, offering an immersive and visually stunning gaming experience.
  • High-Quality Graphics: Every corner of the universe is rendered in exquisite detail.
  • Realistic Physics and Light: Behold the wonders of the universe in all its realistic glory.
  • Self-Expanding Model: Watch as your universe expands and evolves, reflecting your journey and growth.
  • Spaceships and Ground Vehicles Controlling: Take the helm of your spaceship and ground vehicles, and navigate the vast expanses of space and alien terrains.
  • Exploring Planets and Space: Discover new planets and galaxies, each with its own unique landscape and challenges.

Embark on your journey across the cosmos, explore the unknown, and create your own space saga in Aposfera Spacetrips. Become the author of your own space adventure and see where the stars will lead you. The universe is yours to discover.

Become the Master of Your Universe

In Aposfera Spacetrips, your experience is entirely your own. Whether you want to become an intergalactic explorer, a master builder, a thriving trader, or a meditative space wanderer, the game lets you carve your own path. The universe is your canvas, and you can paint your story across the cosmos.

Activity:
  • Dynamic Economy: Trade, negotiate, and build a network of prosperous colonies. The game's dynamic economy system allows you to impact the universe in more ways than one.
  • Complex Building System: Unleash your creativity with our advanced building system. Construct intricate spacecraft, design vast space stations, and create bustling colonies that reflect your vision.
  • Varied Mission Types: With a multitude of mission types, you can choose to mine asteroids, trade between star systems, explore deep space, or simply cruise the cosmos.
  • Hostile Alien Species and Natural Phenomena: The universe is teeming with life and mystery. Encounter hostile alien species, navigate through perilous black holes, and witness the awe-inspiring spectacle of supernovas.
  • Procedurally Generated Planets: Every planet you discover is unique, offering endless landscapes to explore and resources to exploit.
2209980.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
